function.name: align_sem_aperture
function.description: Aligns the condenser aperture of a scanning electron microscope at a specified beam current.

prompt: Align aperture 3 on the SEM at a beam current of 0.8 nA.

function.name: bias_mass_spec_quadrupole
function.description: Sets DC bias voltage on a quadrupole mass analyzer rod pair.

prompt: Set the y rod pair bias on the quadrupole to 12.5 V.

function.name: decode_telemetry_packet_frame
function.description: Decodes a satellite CCSDS telemetry frame from a hex string.

prompt: Decode the CCSDS frame 1ACFFC1D5544 with APID 100.

function.name: steer_accelerator_beam_dipole
function.description: Adjusts a dipole magnet current to steer the particle beam in an accelerator section.

prompt: Set dipole D12 current to 420 A in the accelerator ring.

function.name: restore_typewriter_platen_tension
function.description: Adjusts the platen tension spring on a vintage typewriter.

prompt: Tighten the platen spring on my Olivetti Lettera 32 by 1.5 turns.

function.name: profile_film_scanner_color
function.description: Generates an ICC color profile for a 35mm film scanner using an IT8 target.

prompt: Profile my Nikon Coolscan 5000 using IT8 target Q60-R2.

function.name: launch_weather_balloon
function.description: Initiates a weather balloon release with a chosen helium fill volume.

prompt: Launch balloon from site KDEN with 2.4 cubic meters of helium.

function.name: deploy_vibration_sensor_mesh
function.description: Configures a wireless mesh of vibration sensors at a given sample rate.

prompt: Deploy 24 vibration nodes at 1000 Hz.

function.name: tune_theremin_pitch_antenna
function.description: Tunes the pitch antenna capacitance on a theremin.

prompt: Trim the pitch antenna on theremin TH-882 to 4.7 pF.

function.name: automate_mixing_console_scene
function.description: Recalls a snapshot scene on a digital mixing console.

prompt: Recall scene 17 on console FOH-A.

function.name: calibrate_pyranometer_offset
function.description: Sets the zero-irradiance offset on a pyranometer.

prompt: Set pyranometer PY-04 offset to -2.1 W/m^2.

function.name: anneal_optical_fiber_splice
function.description: Runs an arc-anneal cycle on a fusion-spliced fiber.

prompt: Anneal splice S-771 with a 1200 ms arc.

function.name: set_lidar_scan_pattern
function.description: Sets the scan pattern of a terrestrial LiDAR head.

prompt: Use a spiral scan pattern at 3.5 lines per degree.

function.name: purge_glovebox_atmosphere
function.description: Purges an inert-gas glovebox to a target oxygen ppm.

prompt: Purge glovebox GB-2 until O2 reaches 0.5 ppm.

function.name: rewind_magnetic_tape_reel
function.description: Rewinds a quarter-inch master tape on a reel-to-reel deck.

prompt: Rewind reel on deck Studer A810 at 30 ips.

function.name: polarize_neutron_supermirror
function.description: Sets the magnetic field of a neutron supermirror polarizer.

prompt: Set supermirror SM-9 field to 32 mT.

function.name: engrave_microfluidic_channel
function.description: Engraves a microfluidic channel into PDMS using a CO2 laser.

prompt: Engrave a 50 um microfluidic channel at 8 W.

function.name: trigger_seismograph_event_capture
function.description: Arms a seismograph for event capture above an amplitude threshold.

prompt: Arm station NRA1 to trigger on motion above 12 um/s.

function.name: rebias_geiger_muller_tube
function.description: Sets the bias voltage on a Geiger-Muller detector tube.

prompt: Set GM tube SBM-20 to 400 V.

function.name: level_interferometer_optical_table
function.description: Auto-levels a pneumatic optical table for interferometry.

prompt: Level optical table OT-3 to within 5 urad.

function.name: compress_audio_console_bus
function.description: Engages a bus compressor on a mixing console.

prompt: Compress the drum bus at a 4:1 ratio.

function.name: spin_centrifuge_rotor
function.description: Spins a fixed-angle centrifuge rotor at a target RCF.

prompt: Spin rotor F45-30-11 at 14000 g.

function.name: patch_modular_synth_jack
function.description: Routes a virtual patch cable between two modular synthesizer jacks.

prompt: Patch VCO1.out to VCF1.cv.

function.name: ignite_plasma_torch
function.description: Ignites an ICP plasma torch at a specified RF power.

prompt: Ignite ICP torch T1 at 1300 W.

function.name: deglitch_rf_spectrum_trace
function.description: Applies a deglitch filter to a captured RF spectrum trace.

prompt: Deglitch trace TR-22 at -85 dB.

function.name: load_vintage_synth_patch
function.description: Loads a patch on a vintage analog synthesizer.

prompt: Load patch 'Lush Strings' on Prophet-5.

function.name: rotate_radio_telescope_dish
function.description: Rotates a radio telescope dish to azimuth and elevation.

prompt: Point the dish to azimuth 132.4, elevation 45.0.

function.name: load_etcher_recipe
function.description: Loads a plasma etcher process recipe.

prompt: Load recipe SiN_Soft on etcher LAM-380.

function.name: set_oscilloscope_trigger_level
function.description: Configures the trigger level on an oscilloscope channel.

prompt: Set channel 2 trigger to 1.25 V.

function.name: rewax_vinyl_lacquer_cut
function.description: Adjusts wax depth on a vinyl mastering lathe cutter head.

prompt: Set lathe Neumann VMS-70 cut depth to 75 um.

function.name: schedule_cryostat_cooldown
function.description: Schedules a dilution refrigerator cooldown to a base temperature with a stage hold.

prompt: Cool down fridge BlueFors LD-400 to 10 mK with a 45-minute stage hold.

function.name: tune_atomic_clock_cavity
function.description: Tunes the microwave cavity of a cesium atomic clock to a target frequency with a finesse setting.

prompt: Tune cesium clock CS-7 cavity to 9192631770 Hz with finesse 30000.

function.name: calibrate_pellistor_gas_sensor
function.description: Calibrates a pellistor combustible gas sensor with a test gas concentration.

prompt: Calibrate pellistor P-118 against methane at 5000 ppm.

function.name: configure_phased_array_radar_beam
function.description: Configures the beam pointing of a phased array radar with steering angle and pulse repetition.

prompt: Steer phased array PAR-3 to 25 degrees with PRF 1200 Hz.

function.name: align_xray_diffractometer_goniometer
function.description: Aligns the goniometer of an X-ray diffractometer at a chosen 2-theta and chi angle.

prompt: Align diffractometer XRD-Bruker-D8 to 2-theta 44.5 and chi 0.0.

function.name: schedule_cubesat_ground_pass
function.description: Schedules a ground station contact pass for a CubeSat with a specific elevation mask.

prompt: Schedule a pass for NORAD 25544 at station SVALSAT-1 with 10 degree elevation mask.

function.name: etch_silicon_wafer_via_drie
function.description: Runs a deep reactive ion etching process on a silicon wafer with a Bosch process recipe.

prompt: DRIE wafer W-2025-08 to 120 um depth using 380 Bosch cycles.

function.name: modulate_femtosecond_laser_pulse
function.description: Modulates a femtosecond laser pulse with a chirp and pulse energy.

prompt: Modulate laser FS-Spitfire-Pro with chirp 4500 fs^2 and 25 uJ pulse energy.

function.name: calibrate_pitot_tube_airspeed
function.description: Calibrates a pitot-static airspeed sensor over a velocity range with an altitude offset.

prompt: Calibrate pitot PT-19 up to 250 kt at 5000 ft.

function.name: stitch_microscope_tile_mosaic
function.description: Stitches a tiled mosaic of microscope frames using overlap and registration mode.

prompt: Stitch mosaic dataset MOSAIC-22 with 15% overlap using phase mode.

function.name: configure_anechoic_chamber_sweep
function.description: Configures a frequency sweep inside an anechoic RF chamber for an EUT.

prompt: Sweep EUT BLE-43 from 2400 to 2483.5 MHz in the chamber.

function.name: ratchet_torque_wrench_calibration
function.description: Calibrates a torque wrench at a setpoint and tolerance band.

prompt: Calibrate torque wrench TW-441 at 85 Nm with 4% tolerance.

function.name: tune_cavity_filter_helix
function.description: Tunes a helical cavity filter to a center frequency and bandwidth.

prompt: Tune helical filter HF-12 to 145.5 MHz with 25 kHz bandwidth.

function.name: monitor_glacier_strain_gauge
function.description: Starts a monitoring session on a glacier-mounted strain gauge.

prompt: Monitor strain gauge SG-Iceland-2 for 72 hours, sampling every 30 seconds.

function.name: demodulate_apt_satellite_signal
function.description: Demodulates an APT signal from a NOAA weather satellite at a given subcarrier.

prompt: Demodulate APT from NOAA-19 at 2400 Hz subcarrier from recording noaa19_pass.iq.

function.name: calibrate_hall_probe_gauss
function.description: Calibrates a Hall effect probe at a reference magnetic field with temperature compensation.

prompt: Calibrate Hall probe HP-9 at 5000 gauss and 22 C.

function.name: set_klystron_repeller_voltage
function.description: Sets the repeller voltage of a reflex klystron amplifier at given beam current.

prompt: Set klystron K-723 repeller to -210 V at 27 mA beam.

function.name: deploy_ocean_argo_float
function.description: Programs a deployment of an Argo profiling float with target park depth and cycle period.

prompt: Program Argo float ARGO-4901 to park at 1000 m with a 10-day cycle.

function.name: set_spectrometer_grating_blaze
function.description: Selects a spectrometer grating with blaze wavelength and groove density.

prompt: Set spectrometer SPEX-500M to blaze 500 nm grating with 1200 grooves/mm.

function.name: rebuild_jukebox_tonearm_alignment
function.description: Rebuilds tonearm alignment on a vintage jukebox with overhang and azimuth.

prompt: Align Wurlitzer 1015 tonearm with 18 mm overhang and 0.5 degree azimuth.

function.name: configure_photomultiplier_gain
function.description: Sets gain and discriminator threshold on a photomultiplier tube.

prompt: Set PMT-R7600 gain to 1.5e6 with threshold 30 mV.

function.name: tune_cyclotron_dee_voltage
function.description: Sets the dee voltage and RF frequency in a cyclotron acceleration chamber.

prompt: Tune cyclotron C-30 with dee voltage 50 kV and RF 27.12 MHz.

function.name: calibrate_load_cell_offset
function.description: Calibrates load cell offset and full-scale span.

prompt: Calibrate load cell LC-87 with offset 0.02 mV/V and 500 kg span.

function.name: preheat_3d_printer_chamber
function.description: Preheats a 3D printer build chamber and bed.

prompt: Preheat printer Stratasys-F900 chamber to 90 C and bed to 130 C.

function.name: extract_chromatogram_peak
function.description: Extracts a peak from a chromatogram by retention time and integration window.

prompt: Extract peak at retention time 7.4 min with a 20 s window from run HPLC-2025-117.

function.name: rebalance_helicopter_rotor_blade
function.description: Rebalances a helicopter rotor blade with track and weight tab.

prompt: Rebalance blade BL-3 with 1.2 mm track offset and 8 g tab weight.

function.name: align_lidar_imu_extrinsic
function.description: Aligns LiDAR-to-IMU extrinsic calibration via roll/pitch/yaw offsets.

prompt: Align LiDAR-IMU on vehicle AV-12 with 0.4 deg roll and -1.7 deg yaw.

function.name: set_pellet_press_die_pressure
function.description: Configures a hydraulic pellet press die pressure and dwell time.

prompt: Set pellet press PP-2 to 25 tons for 60 s dwell.

function.name: tune_vacuum_tube_amp_bias
function.description: Sets cathode bias on a vacuum tube guitar amplifier.

prompt: Bias my Marshall JCM800 EL34 tubes to 35 mA.

function.name: calibrate_ph_meter_buffer
function.description: Calibrates a pH meter with two buffer solutions at a reference temperature.

prompt: Calibrate pH meter PH-08 with buffers 4.00 and 7.00 at 25 C.

function.name: trim_servo_loop_pid
function.description: Trims a servo controller PID loop with proportional, integral, and derivative gains.

prompt: Trim servo SRV-44 with Kp 1.8, Ki 0.05, Kd 0.2.

function.name: log_ev_battery_pack_cycle
function.description: Logs a charge/discharge cycle on an EV battery pack with state-of-charge endpoints.

prompt: Log a cycle on pack EV-PACK-22 from SoC 0.95 down to 0.20 at 1C.

function.name: decode_apco25_voice_frame
function.description: Decodes an APCO P25 Phase 2 voice frame from IQ samples.

prompt: Decode P25 voice from capture p25_001.iq at 851.1125 MHz with NAC 293.

function.name: rebuild_pinball_flipper_coil
function.description: Rebuilds a pinball machine flipper coil with new resistance and stop sleeve.

prompt: Rebuild flipper coil on Twilight Zone with part FL-11630 and a 27 mm sleeve.

function.name: calibrate_doppler_anemometer
function.description: Calibrates a laser Doppler anemometer with a particle seeding rate and focal length.

prompt: Calibrate LDA-7 with 310 mm focal length and seeding rate 5000 Hz.

function.name: schedule_telescope_adaptive_optics_loop
function.description: Schedules an adaptive optics closed-loop run with a guide star, frame rate, and Strehl target.

prompt: Run AO closed loop on Keck-II using guide star HD-83443 at 1000 Hz, targeting Strehl 0.7.

function.name: configure_mass_spec_srm_transition
function.description: Configures a selected reaction monitoring transition on a triple quadrupole MS with collision energy.

prompt: Set SRM on TSQ-Altis: precursor 609.3, product 195.1, collision 32 eV.

function.name: run_synchrotron_beamline_scan
function.description: Runs a synchrotron beamline energy scan with monochromator step, dwell time, and sample environment.

prompt: Scan beamline ID-21 from 7.0 keV in 0.5 eV steps with 200 ms dwell.

function.name: schedule_alma_interferometer_track
function.description: Schedules an ALMA mm-wave interferometer track with band, integration time, and water vapor limit.

pwv_mm_max.description: Max precipitable water vapor in mm

prompt: Schedule ALMA project 2026.1.00123.S in band 7 for 45 min, max PWV 1.2 mm.

function.name: configure_quantum_dilution_circuit
function.description: Configures readout pulses for a superconducting qubit chip with pulse amplitude, length, and IF frequency.

prompt: Configure readout for chip QC-Falcon-7 qubit 3 with amplitude 0.45 and length 1200 ns.

function.name: deploy_neutrino_string_module
function.description: Deploys an IceCube-style DOM string with module spacing, depth range, and trigger threshold.

prompt: Deploy string ICS-86 with 17 m module spacing from 1450 m down, trigger threshold 0.25 PE.

function.name: tune_gravitational_wave_detector_arm
function.description: Tunes a LIGO-class detector arm cavity with finesse, recycling gain, and squeeze level.

prompt: Tune arm X with finesse 450, recycling gain 38, squeeze 6 dB.

function.name: schedule_volcanic_infrasound_array_recording
function.description: Schedules an infrasound array recording at a volcano observatory with array geometry and bandpass.

prompt: Record at Stromboli with 200 m aperture, 8 Hz lowpass, 24 hours.

function.name: calibrate_tof_secondary_ion_mass_spec
function.description: Calibrates a ToF-SIMS instrument with primary beam energy, pulse width, and mass resolution.

prompt: Calibrate ToF-SIMS IONTOF-V with 25 keV primary, 0.9 ns pulse, mass resolution 10000.

function.name: configure_deep_uv_lithography_stepper
function.description: Configures a deep-UV lithography stepper with wavelength, numerical aperture, sigma, and exposure dose.

prompt: Configure ASML-NXT-2050 at 193 nm, NA 1.35, dose 28 mJ/cm^2.

function.name: schedule_drone_swarm_lidar_survey
function.description: Schedules a drone swarm LiDAR survey with grid spacing, altitude, overlap, and target point density.

prompt: Survey with swarm SW-Alpha at 120 m altitude, 60% overlap, density 150 pts/m^2.

function.name: calibrate_haptic_glove_force_feedback
function.description: Calibrates a haptic feedback glove with per-finger force limits and a response latency target.

prompt: Calibrate haptic glove HG-X12 with thumb 4 N, index 3 N, latency 8 ms.

function.name: run_wind_tunnel_yaw_sweep
function.description: Runs a wind tunnel yaw sweep with Mach number, yaw range, and step increment.

prompt: Sweep tunnel NTF at Mach 0.85, yaw from -10 deg in 1 deg steps.

function.name: configure_fmri_pulse_sequence
function.description: Configures an fMRI EPI pulse sequence with TR, TE, flip angle, and slice thickness.

prompt: Configure scanner Prisma-3T with TR 2000 ms, TE 30 ms, flip angle 78 deg.

function.name: tune_traveling_wave_tube_amplifier
function.description: Tunes a TWT amplifier with helix voltage, collector voltage, and saturated output power.

prompt: Tune TWT-Hughes-8916 with helix 6.2 kV, collector 4.1 kV, Psat 200 W.
